meaning: adj.有教养的,讲究的,有修养的
examples: Mironov is one of only a few scientists worldwide involved in bioengineering cultured meat.
A developmental biologist and tissue engineer, Dr. Mironov, is one of only a few scientists worldwide involved in bioengineering "cultured" meat.
He is a cultured man with a wide circle of friends.
Cultured meat could be grown in sterile conditions, avoiding Salmonella, E. coli, Campylobacter and other nasties.
Protective effect of Toki-shakuyaku-san on amyloid beta25-35-induced neuronal damage in cultured rat cortical neurons.
